name: Pop N Ride - VR Roller Coaster

reviews.review_description: I was given a flip-flop to pop balloons with!  I saw a similar app several years ago where you were given a gun to pop the balloons.  That was more fun.

developer_response.body: Thanks for playing our game. As per your requirement we have added Gun to pop balloons, hope you will enjoy it. Please update the game from store and hope to get better stars from you.

reviews.review_description: I liked popping balloons while having a thrilling ride.

developer_response.body: Thanks for playing our game and review.

reviews.review_description: It was great fun poping baloons while ride. Also add some music to make it more interesting.

developer_response.body: Thanks for your review. We have added more music. Enjoy the ride.

reviews.review_title: Instructions on how to play the game
reviews.review_description: Can you tell me how do you play the game and bust the balloons?

developer_response.body: Thanks for asking. In the game, you ride the roller coaster and pop balloons along the way. To burst them, just reach out with your Quest controllers and touch the balloons as you pass by.

reviews.review_description: I cannot get this app to work! I just stand under the coaster with no direction or options. Poorly made!

developer_response.body: Hi! Thank you for your feedback 🙏 We’re sorry you faced this issue. The problem was that sometimes the menu UI appeared slightly off to the side, making it hard to see or interact with. We’ve fixed this now, and the menu will always appear directly in front of you for easier navigation. We’d love for you to try the updated version and share your thoughts again with better Stars
